name: Shrimp Boiled in Beer
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the shrimp.
2. In a large pot, combine the remaining ingredients and bring to a boil.
3. Add the shrimp to the boiling mixture.
4. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer, uncovered.
5. Cook until the shrimp are done.
6. Drain the shrimp and serve with melted butter seasoned with lemon juice and Tabasco sauce.
Alternatively, chill the shrimp and serve with mayonnaise.
